Silver - Regime State

A Deterministic Summary of Silver Macro Regime Conditions.

As of 2026-02-21

Gemini Summary

### Silver Regime State — Deterministic Summary
Regime Dimension Current State Primary Signal Drivers
Primary Macro Regime Safe Haven / Counter-Trend Stress Override logic active via Elevated VIX (12); Speculative short-stretch z-score of -1.95 indicates mean-reversion potential (7).
Liquidity Regime Neutral Fed Liquidity Composite is Neutral (2); M2 growth (4.6%) remains within neutral boundaries (3); r* Proxy stability confirms lack of expansionary impulse (4).
Real Rate Regime Bearish (Headwind) 10Y Real Yield (1.85%) remains above the 6-month trend (1.83%), maintaining restrictive pressure (1).
USD Regime Bullish (Weakening) USD Index is Bearish/Weakening as it trades below its 12-month average with negative 6-month momentum (5).
Inflation Regime Neutral Inflation Term Structure remains Neutral (8); Market-implied inflation expectations are Stable (9); PCE inflation is range-bound above target (10).
Positioning & Flows Bullish Asymmetry Speculators are near an extreme short stretch (z-score -1.95) (7); Commercial hedgers are in "Deep Long" territory, indicating physical support or producer buying (7); Low spec-hedger divergence suggests positioning consensus (15).
Stress & Volatility Elevated VIX level (20.23) and MVS z-score (0.91) trigger the Elevated regime status (12); Financial Stress Index remains Neutral but has recently risen from deeper negative levels (11).
1-Month Horizon Bias Bullish Driven by USD weakening, spec short-exhaustion, and safe-haven demand override (5)(7)(12).
3-Month Horizon Bias Neutral Real rate headwinds and neutral liquidity expansion limit structural upside once positioning is washed out (1)(2).
Conflict Flags Active Real Rate Headwind (1) vs USD Weakening (5); Hedger Supply Expansion (14) vs Spec Short Stretch (7).

Market Expression (Confirmatory): Silver (SLV) is currently trading above both 50-day and 200-day moving averages (76.62) with extremely high realized volatility, confirming the Elevated stress regime (17)(12).

The information presented is for general informational purposes only and does not constitute financial or investment advice. It has been prepared without regard to individual objectives, financial situation, or needs.
